name: Vegetarian Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add carrots and onion; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
2. If the pan sticks, add 1 to 2 tablespoons water.
3. Stir in garlic; cook for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Add drained and rinsed beans, basil, oregano, tomatoes (broken up), tomato paste, and mushrooms. Simmer, covered, for 25 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Add broccoli and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in pepper.
